description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this medium coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with moulded soft cups and a pretty printed panel at the cups and straps, with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support through the day.Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfortMoulded soft cups and a pretty printed panel for perfect shaping and styleBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade
